title: Markdown with Code, LaTeX, and Mermaid Rendering

findings.description: MarkdownRenderer uses react-markdown with remark-gfm (tables, strikethrough), remark-math (LaTeX), rehype-highlight (syntax highlighting), and rehype-katex (math rendering with KaTeX CSS imported)
findings.evidence: MarkdownRenderer.tsx: imports remarkGfm, remarkMath, rehypeHighlight, rehypeKatex, and katex/dist/katex.min.css

findings.description: Mermaid diagram support with async rendering, dark/light theme adaptation, fullscreen expand with pan/zoom, loading state, and error handling
findings.evidence: MermaidDiagram.tsx: dynamic import of mermaid, dark theme detection, fullscreen modal with CSS transforms for pan/zoom

findings.description: Code blocks include copy button functionality and language detection
findings.evidence: MarkdownRenderer.tsx imports CopyButton from shared; code renderer checks for language-* class pattern

findings.description: Tests exist for LaTeX and Mermaid rendering specifically
Cannot visually verify markdown rendering in an active conversation due to conversation crash issue
